revision.comment: Start template
revision.text: <table cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0" style="{{{style|}}}"><noinclude>{{Documentation|Template:Chart/doc}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: moved [[Template:Chart/Start]] to [[Template:Chart/start]]: case
revision.text: <table cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0" style="{{{style|}}}"><noinclude>{{Documentation|Template:Chart/doc}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected Template:Chart/start: [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|Highly-visible template]] (over 1000 transclusions) (‎[edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) ‎[move=sysop] (indefinite))
revision.text: <table cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0" style="{{{style|}}}"><noinclude>{{Documentation|Template:Chart/doc}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: going to create separate doc page just for this tag
revision.text: <table cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0" style="{{{style|}}}"><noinclude>{{Documentation|Template:Chart/start/doc}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: close off table for documentation
revision.text:
<table cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0" style="{{{style|}}}"><noinclude>
{{chart/end}}
{{Documentation|Template:Chart/start/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: update obsolete HTML
revision.text:
<table style="border-collapse: collapse; {{{style|}}}"><noinclude>
{{chart/end}}
{{Documentation|Template:Chart/start/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/Gadget850|Gadget850]] ([[User talk:Gadget850|talk]]) to last version by Dpleibovitz
revision.text:
<table cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0" style="{{{style|}}}"><noinclude>
{{chart/end}}
{{Documentation|Template:Chart/start/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: update obsolete HTML
revision.text:
<table style="border-spacing: 0px; {{{style|}}}"><noinclude>
{{chart/end}}
{{Documentation|Template:Chart/start/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: align
revision.text:
<table style="border-spacing: 0px; {{#switch: {{{align|}}}
|left = float: left;
|right = float: right;
|center = margin: 0 auto;
|#default = 
}} {{{style|}}}"><noinclude>
{{chart/end}}
{{Documentation|Template:Chart/start/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level for "[[Template:Chart/start]]": [[WP:HIGHRISK|high-risk]] template with 2000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
<table style="border-spacing: 0px; {{#switch: {{{align|}}}
|left = float: left;
|right = float: right;
|center = margin: 0 auto;
|#default = 
}} {{{style|}}}"><noinclude>
{{chart/end}}
{{Documentation|Template:Chart/start/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: mobile doesn't have border-collapse: separate, and without it you cannot accurately set table borders of cells
revision.text:
<table style="border-spacing: 0px; border-collapse: separate; {{#switch: {{{align|}}}
|left = float: left;
|right = float: right;
|center = margin: 0 auto;
|#default = 
}} {{{style|}}}"><noinclude>
{{chart/end}}
{{Documentation|Template:Chart/start/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Chart/start]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]] ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
<table style="border-spacing: 0px; border-collapse: separate; {{#switch: {{{align|}}}
|left = float: left;
|right = float: right;
|center = margin: 0 auto;
|#default = 
}} {{{style|}}}"><noinclude>
{{chart/end}}
{{Documentation|Template:Chart/start/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
